//: IN-TREE BROWSER EMIT (no bundler). This config drives `build.ts`: tsc type-strips the app + its browser-safe workspace dependencies to native ES modules under dist/esm, preserving the source tree. `rewriteRelativeImportExtensions` turns every relative `./x.ts` import into `./x.js`; bare `@bsv-poker/*` specifiers are LEFT INTACT and resolved at load time by the generated import map (see build.ts). There is NO Vite/Rollup/esbuild — the browser's own module loader is the runtime. Only the 10 browser-safe packages are included; the node:crypto packages (crypto-mentalpoker, wallet-custody, adapters, tx-builder, script-templates-ts, sdk) are intentionally excluded and never reached by the app's static graph.
